sourceMovie.title: Rampage
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Rampage for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a adventure rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Brad Peyton keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Pacific Rim
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Rampage clicked for you, Pacific Rim (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Rampage?
faq.answer: Try Pacific Rim, Godzilla vs. Kong, Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire—each shares DNA with Rampage while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Rampage?
faq.answer: Rampage (2018) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Rampage worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
